sevenDay.synopsis: Cigs are generally MVFR this morning with some light showers traversing the LFA. Rain chances will be on the rise for the PM but rain becomes widespread for the N1. Cigs will likely drop by the start of the N1 period and will remain down til mid-AM tomorrow. Rain continues thru the AM tomorrow, and winds will pick up behind the front. After a nice few days, another boundary heads our way late next week, dropping cigs for Wednesday and Thursday AM and ushering in another round of rain Thursday AM.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 01 MAY - 07 MAY
